title: bridge-matrix: constant-time hs_token comparison via subtle is correct
description: bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs as_transaction: uses subtle::ConstantTimeEq for hs_token comparison, preventing timing attacks on the bearer token. A contributor might suggest replacing with == for simplicity. This must stay as constant-time comparison — the hs_token is a bearer credential and timing differences on the comparison would leak prefix information.
